title: Amtech S1870 Set of Clear Glue Gun Sticks for Hot Melt Crafting, Decorating and Bonding, 12 Pieces, 11mm x 100mm
features: QUICK SETTING: This 12 pack of 11mm x 100mm clear, hot melt glue gun sticks is quick drying and strong bonding and is ideal for bonding paper, wood, leather, ceramics, porcelain and glass
COMPATIBLE WITH: The sticks are compatible with Amtech's 50W glue gun (S1850) and 35-80W cordless glue gun (S1845)
CAUTION: Do not touch the glue gun’s nozzle or any hot melted glue
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Amtech has a fantastic range of hobby and craft tools and accessories to meet all your creative requirements cost effectively. A selection of Glue stick sizes and quantities are available for hot melt crafting, decorating and bonding objects. Amtech’s great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 12 glue gun sticks See more
